title: Zoto Spec System Subtask Status
description: Canonical JSON/YAML payload for a single subtask live-status file (paired with a block-marked `.status.md`). The yml is authoritative for machine round-trips; see `docs/status-schema.md`.

schema_version.description: Schema revision for this document. Bump only when breaking the subtask status contract.

subtask_id.description: Zero-padded subtask number from the spec manifest (e.g. `01`, `02`).

assigned_agent.description: Agent id assigned by the spec manifest (e.g. `zoto-software-engineer`). May differ if the executor substitutes another registered agent.

model.description: Resolved model slug at subagent spawn time.

token_budget.description: Resolved token budget at spawn time; typically mirrors `subagents.<role>.tokenBudget` from config.

state.description: High-level execution state for this subtask.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when execution started, if known.

last_heartbeat.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent status write or progress ping.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the subtask reached a terminal state (`completed` or `failed`), if known.

checklist.description: Deliverables checklist with stable `id` values so round-trip tooling can merge agent hand-edits in markdown.

artifacts.description: Files created, modified, or deleted while executing this subtask.

errors.description: Structured error and warn log lines captured during execution.

notes.description: Free-form notes for humans. Rendered as a single markdown block between `notes` markers.

git_sha.description: Best-effort `git rev-parse HEAD` at last write.

agent_session_id.description: Cursor agent session identifier when available (e.g. `process.env.CURSOR_AGENT_SESSION_ID`).

extra.description: Escape hatch for forward-compatible fields not yet in this schema.
